chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – Penalty (Hadd) of the children regarding the theft

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: إِذَا سَرَقَ الصَّبِيُّ وَ لَمْ يَحْتَلِمْ قُطِعَتْ أَطْرَافُ أَصَابِعِهِ قَالَ وَ قَالَ [عَلِيٌّ ع] لَمْ يَصْنَعْهُ إِلَّا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ أَنَا .

en.hubeali: Aban, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘When the child steals and he has yet to bed-wet, the ends of his fingers would be cut’. And Ali<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It has not been done except by Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> and myself<sup>asws</sup>’.
